ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "public_holding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the company's shares held by the public */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (Buy or Sell) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price per share */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "public_holding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of public holding after the transaction */,
  "ltp" REAL /* Last traded price (LTP) */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "brokerage" REAL /* Brokerage charged */,
  "stamp_duty" REAL /* Stamp duty charged */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax charged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the chart is associated with */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Data for the chart (e.g., JSON or image URL) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, company, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock split is related to */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the dividend is related to */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared */,
  "dividend_per_share" REAL /* Dividend per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
